raw_consumer_statement:
I made a reservation for a rental car through XXXX and paid {$210.00} for the rental of a XXXX XXXX car from XX/XX/XXXX to XX/XX/XXXX using my XXXX XXXX credit card. 

When picking the car up I had to provide a credit card for the deposit and I provided my Barclays XXXX XXXX XXXX  card. XXXX advised us that the car which we had booked was unavailable but that they could provide a replacement. Instead of XXXX XXXX the replacement would be XXXX XXXX. After returning to car on XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX charged us another {$210.00} After we complained they refunded {$53.00} but not the complete amount of {$210.00} We provided evidence to Barclays showing that the car was already prepaid and received a response saying that Services were rendered and the merchant is due payment without addressing the fact that the service had been prepaid through XXXX.
